name: Bioluminescent Stripes
description: A line of glands embedded in your skin secretes a chemical that glows when it interacts with the air. As a single action, you can activate your bioluminescent stripes to glow with a bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for the next 20 feet. While you are glowing, you can't be and you take a –4 item penalty to Stealth checks to and . You can Dismiss the glow as a free action.
